mentions.note: Largest polyolefins (polyethylene) manufacturer; Cramer home run endorsement; working pair with Dow in chemicals space.
Commodity chemical play surging due to polyethylene supply loss from Iran conflict; specialty supply scarcity driving upside.

Petrochemical giant up 86% Q1 on Iran strait closure shortages; benefits from polyethylene tubing demand; textbook cyclical; risk pullback if war ends, but Iran may keep strait closed. Cramer says 'ka-ching.'
Commodity chemical maker benefiting from man-made petrochemical shortage caused by war. Destroyed plastic-refining capacity won't return anytime soon; durable supply-side tailwind.
